series_metadata.series_description: Records in this series are used to evaluate program performance of field staff to assure consistency and compliance with agency policy and Federal guidelines. Records include the following documents: Quality Assurance Case Reviews; Quality Assurance Case Review Report; Quality Assurance Case Review Form Guide; Quality Assurance Request for Administrative Review Form; Training Material; consumer surveys; project proposals; and, any additional record generated in relation to Quality Assurance.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain records for the current year plus two (2) federal fiscal years. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain records for the current year plus two (2) federal fiscal years. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
